evidence_summary: VN-08 flags إِلَّآ as a readable exception particle whose exception frame is not rich-certified.
VN-08 separates lexical إِلًّۭا from the exception particle إِلَّا by exact surface and POS.
VN-08 flags لِلَّهِ as lām plus Allah proper-name host, not a suffix-pronoun row.
VN-08 flags بِكْرٌ as an exact lexical noun/adjective, not bāʾ plus a host.
VN-08 flags شَانِئَكَ as a suffix-bearing nominal row whose كَ object/addressee contribution must be visible.
VN-08 flags إِصْرَهُمْ as a burden noun whose attached هُمْ suffix must be visible.
VN-08 keeps بِالْخُنَّسِ as component-only PP evidence below whole-token certification.
VN-08 keeps بِزَعْمِهِمْ as component-only PP plus suffix evidence below whole-token certification.
VN-08 keeps بِمُعَذَّبِينَ as component-only governed-host evidence below whole-token certification.
VN-08 flags يُخَفَّفُ as finite/passive dictionary leakage requiring form/voice review.
VN-08 flags يُبَايِعُونَكَ as a finite verb whose كَ object suffix must be visible.
